hooks.command: r="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ ! -f "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh" ]; then r=""; fi; if [ -z "$r" ] && [ -d "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" ]; then r="$(find -L "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/litestar/*/hooks/session-start.sh" -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sed 's#/hooks/session-start.sh$##' | tail -n 1)"; fi; if [ -z "$r" ] && [ -f ./hooks/session-start.sh ]; then r="."; fi; [ -n "$r" ] || exit 0; CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT="${r%/}" bash "${r%/}/hooks/session-start.sh"
hooks.description: Inject project-aware Litestar skill reminders into the Codex CLI session context.
